DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional authored documentation source display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Page title and subject display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import an authored MetaCli workspace into a MetaDocs workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional MetaCli application id when the source workspace contains more than one application.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional rendered group name, for example meta-bi.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import selected workspace instance documentation from a modeled opt-in policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional source id used by import-workspace-model, for linking instance docs to model docs.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional stable documentation source id for imported instance docs.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source Meta workspace whose allowed instances should be documented.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import generic model documentation from a Meta workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source Meta workspace whose model should be documented.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an opt-in entity policy for workspace instance documentation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional property used only as the imported instance display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source workspace entity name to include.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional property used only as the imported instance summary.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an opt-in property policy for workspace instance documentation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Property name to import as a generated fact.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an opt-in relationship policy for workspace instance documentation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Relationship selector, navigation name, or relationship column name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Merge multiple MetaDocs workspaces into a suite workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to include. Repeat for many workspaces.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Suite workspace to write. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Render a MetaDocs workspace as a static documentation site.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Output directory. The merged page is written as docs.html.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to render. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Validate a MetaDocs workspace lifecycle and reference integrity.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to validate. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Search documentation subjects, descriptions, and details.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to search. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: List the documentation contents as a navigable tree.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional documentation view id, name, or title.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to list. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an authored description for an existing documentation subject.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Read authored description body from standard input.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Description slot to add or update. Default: Summary.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional description title. Defaults to the slot.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to browse. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh makes repository workflows explicit: it names the workspaces involved, orders the executable steps, validates the inputs, and runs the operation from a model that engineers and agents can inspect.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add one executable step to an operation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Executable or script command to run.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Working directory, absolute or relative to the mesh root.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Model name hosted by the workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path, absolute or relative to the mesh root.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Root path used to resolve relative workspace paths.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Run the steps declared for one operation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Show workspace paths and step commands.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Validate one operation before running it.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Exit code that marks the step as successful. Defaults to 0.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Step arguments support {workspace:<name>.path}, which expands to a declared workspace path, and {env:NAME}, which verifies NAME is non-empty and passes the variable name to the child process. Use --arguments-stdin when child arguments contain quotes, SQL, or shell-sensitive text.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Token substitution

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Run performs validation before starting: ordered step chain, declared workspace paths, executable lookup, working-directory access, and non-empty {env:...} variables must all resolve first.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Preflight

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Validate performs the same preflight as run but starts no child processes.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Preflight

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Read executable arguments from standard input.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create modeled multidimensional database objects, including data source views, and process unless --no-process is used; processing failures fail the command.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Target database name. Defaults to the modeled database name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop an existing target database before create/deploy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Deploy metadata only and skip full processing.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop a multidimensional database from an Analysis Services multidimensional instance with no confirmation prompt.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Promote a processed multidimensional database through backup and restore for pre-prod-to-prod promotion; restore does not process.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Backup file path accessible to the Analysis Services service accounts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop an existing target database before restore.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source Analysis Services server containing the processed database.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Record an explicit success or failure dependency between tasks.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Whether the successor follows predecessor success or failure.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Object selector for object-scoped dependency resolution.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Reason recorded with the policy row.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Record an explicit success dependency/order resolution in an orchestration workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Object selector for object-scoped dependency resolution.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Reason recorded with the policy row.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Allow concurrent execution for multiple Append effects on one object.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Data object whose append writers can overlap.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Reason recorded with the policy row.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute the current run plan by coordinating meta-pipeline worker processes.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Conversion policy workspace passed to child workers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Maximum concurrently granted pipeline tasks. Default: 1.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Operational DB connection environment variable passed to child workers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaPipeline workspace used by child pipeline workers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Operational root for run journals, worker logs, and workspace execution leases.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Startup/activation timeout. Omitted follows --worker-event-timeout-seconds; 0 disables activation timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Timeout while waiting for child workers to connect to the named pipe. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Timeout for silent worker protocol periods. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Explain one analyzer issue and its participating pipelines.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Issue id or unique issue code.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Infer a MetaOrchestration workspace from a modeled MetaPipeline workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Description recorded on the orchestration plan.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Directory where the MetaOrchestration workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Inspect the planned task dependency graph.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: List analyzer issues recorded in an orchestration workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Refresh lock-aware run-plan rows in an orchestration workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Record scoped lock compatibility for one object/effect interaction.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Lock behavior for the object/effect pair.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Left write effect, such as Append, Replace, Mutation, KeyedUpsert, or ConditionalKeyedUpsert.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Data object whose effect interaction is being resolved.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Reason recorded with the policy row.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Right write effect, such as Append, Replace, Mutation, KeyedUpsert, or ConditionalKeyedUpsert.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Append one executable-backed task instance to the pipeline's serial task chain.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Raw command-line arguments passed to the executable.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Executable path or executable name resolvable by the operating system.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Pipeline that receives the new serial step.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Step name; omitted derives a deterministic name from the executable file name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Process timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update. Defaults to the current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add one Pipeline instance to a MetaPipeline workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update. Defaults to the current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Append one transform-backed task instance to the pipeline's serial task chain.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Bounded in-memory row buffer size for InsertRows. Default: 1000.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Binding id when the selected script has multiple bindings.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformBinding workspace used for binding selection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable named by the modeled execution connection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Pipeline that receives the new serial step.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Step name; omitted derives a deterministic name from the script name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Target table identifier when a SELECT binding has multiple targets.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable named by the modeled target connection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: InsertRows target type family. Default: SqlServer.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: SELECT-kind target write model. The only supported value is insert-rows.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: SQL command and bulk-copy timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformScript workspace used for script selection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update. Defaults to the current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create or update the SQL Server MetaPipeline operational DB for diagnostic logs, audit logs, metrics, and failures; it does not store model truth.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable with a SQL Server connection string that can create the database.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute a modeled pipeline's serial task chain with compact live progress including B/KB/MB/GB rate.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformBinding workspace path used for operational run context.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformScript workspace path used for operational run context.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaPipeline workspace. Defaults to the current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute one SQL Server transform script with script selection options and compact live progress including B/KB/MB/GB rate.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Bounded in-memory row buffer size. Default: 1000.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Binding id when the selected script has multiple bindings.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformBinding workspace containing script binding rows.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable for the execution SQL Server connection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Target table identifier when a SELECT binding has multiple targets.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable for the target SQL Server connection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Runtime target type family for InsertRows. Default: SqlServer.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: SQL command and bulk-copy timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no command timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute exactly one modeled pipeline task by task name or id; diagnostic surface, while orchestration uses execute-worker.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformBinding workspace path used for operational run context.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Pipeline task name or id to execute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformScript workspace path used for operational run context.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaPipeline workspace. Defaults to the current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute a modeled pipeline as an orchestration worker boundary over a named pipe; stdout and stderr are diagnostics only; preserves that pipeline context and handles GrantTask and StopPipeline.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformBinding workspace path used for operational run context.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Named pipe used for orchestration worker control messages.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Timeout while connecting to the orchestration control pipe. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Pipeline name to execute as a worker.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformScript workspace path used for operational run context.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaPipeline workspace. Defaults to the current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Show a compact MetaPipeline workspace summary.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaPipeline workspace to inspect. Defaults to the current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create an empty sanctioned MetaPipeline workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Prune old completed RunDiagnosticsLog rows while preserving RunLog and audit lineage.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Report eligible rows without deleting them.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable for the initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Delete eligible diagnostic rows older than this retention window.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract SQL Server schema into a MetaSchema workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract all SQL Server schemas in scope.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract all SQL Server tables and views in scope.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Directory where the MetaSchema workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source system name recorded in the workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract one SQL Server table or view.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Apply a deploy manifest after source and live fingerprint validation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Deploy manifest workspace created by deploy-plan.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source MetaSql workspace used to create the manifest.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create a deploy manifest from a source MetaSql workspace and a live SQL Server database.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Approve one exact destructive column drop in the form schema.table.column.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Approve one exact destructive table drop in the form schema.table.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Approve one exact destructive column truncation in the form schema.table.column.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Directory where the deploy manifest workspace will be written.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source MetaSql workspace to compare with the live database.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute a SQL Server file or query for demo, bootstrap, and verification scripts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute SQL from a file. Mutually exclusive with --query.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute inline SQL. Mutually exclusive with --file.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Command timeout for each SQL batch. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Replace one SQLCMD-style $(NAME) token before execution.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract SQL Server database objects into a MetaSql workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create an empty database/schema workspace when no tables or modules match.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract function modules. If any include switch is provided, only selected object kinds are extracted.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract stored procedure modules. If any include switch is provided, only selected object kinds are extracted.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract tables, columns, keys, and indexes. If no include switch is provided, all object kinds are extracted.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract view modules. If any include switch is provided, only selected object kinds are extracted.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Directory where the MetaSql workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract only one SQL Server schema.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Extract only one table. SQL module extraction is skipped when a table filter is used.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create modeled tabular database objects, including calculation groups, and process unless --no-process is used; processing failures fail the command.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Target database name. Defaults to the modeled database name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop an existing target database before create/deploy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Deploy metadata only and skip full processing.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop a tabular database from an Analysis Services tabular instance with no confirmation prompt.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Process an existing tabular database, table, or partition.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Partition name or id to process. Requires --table.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Refresh type. Defaults to Full. Common values: Full, DataOnly, Calculate, ClearValues, Automatic, Add, Defragment.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Table name or id to process instead of the whole database.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Promote a processed tabular database through backup and restore for pre-prod-to-prod promotion; restore does not process.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Backup file path accessible to the Analysis Services service accounts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop an existing target database before restore.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source Analysis Services server containing the processed database.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Bind transform scripts and validate them against source and target schema contracts into a new workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Save only objects that bind and validate successfully.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional sanctioned conversion policy workspace. Omitted uses built-in defaults.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execution context for one/two-part source identifiers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required when any one-part source identifier exists.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Comma-separated target columns to exclude from target conformance checks.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Comma-separated target columns to exclude only on target tables where they exist.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Directory where the binding workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: TSV report for objects skipped due to binding or validation failure. Requires --allow-partial.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required when SQL code is bare SELECT or mutation text without a CREATE wrapper.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional for CREATE VIEW imports; required for bare SELECT; not allowed for inline CREATE FUNCTION or mutation imports.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add one script to an existing workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional for CREATE VIEW imports; required for bare SELECT; not allowed for inline CREATE FUNCTION or mutation imports.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add one script to an existing workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import many .sql files from an explicit manifest.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: TSV manifest with a Path column and optional Target column.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Print one progress line per imported file.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add successful imports to an existing workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or replace stored procedure contract metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Human note stored on the contract.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Declare a result column for a named result rowset.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformScript workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Remove a stored procedure contract and its declared rows.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformScript workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Inspect one stored procedure transform script by name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformScript workspace to inspect. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Derive view target identifiers from transform script names.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Exit successfully even when the pattern updates no target identifiers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Show what would change without saving the workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Skip view scripts that already have a target identifier.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Pattern matched against TransformScript.Name. Tokens use {name}.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Pattern rendered into TargetSqlIdentifier from captured source tokens.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformScript workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Emit one transform script as SQL text.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required when the workspace contains multiple scripts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformScript workspace to export. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Emit SQL scripts to a file or folder.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTransformScript workspace to export. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a property binding between two model references.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaWeave workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Local model alias used by bindings.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaWeave workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Validate property bindings across referenced workspaces.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaWeave workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Materialize a new workspace from a valid weave.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Empty target directory for the materialized workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaWeave workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaWeave workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary
